# Ohmitex Smart Controls Ltd

> Engineering company specializing in automation, control systems and instrumentation products in Kenya.

Ohmitex Smart Controls Ltd is a Nairobi, Kenya-based engineering company. We design, assemble, commission and maintain control panels, building management systems (BMS), home automation, industrial automation, energy management, and HVAC control solutions for commercial, residential and industrial clients across Kenya.

## Services

- **Control Panel Design & Assembly** — DDC panels, MCC panels, LV switchgear, instrument panels
- **Building Management Systems (BMS)** — HVAC automation, access control, energy monitoring for commercial buildings
- **Home Automation** — Smart lighting, climate control, security integration using KNX/Crestron/AMX
- **Industrial Automation** — PLC/SCADA systems, process control, motor control centres
- **Energy Management Systems** — Power monitoring, demand management, renewable integration
- **Instrumentation & Control** — Field instruments, transmitters, control valve sizing and installation

## Coverage Areas

Nairobi, Mombasa, Kisumu, Nakuru and across Kenya.

## Legal

- Privacy Policy compliant with Kenya Data Protection Act 2019 and GDPR
- Effective date: 1 January 2026
